productDisplayName: Baggit Women Chapati Jassy Bronze Belt
description: Style NoteA belt is an essential detail to complete your ensemble and this belt from baggit is made of leatherette for optimal style and durability. With a generous, adjustable Fit, cinch this fashionable belt over a silk dress or wrap it around those stylish skinnies! Product Details Slim belt with tang clasp to offer a snug fit and to hold the belt in place and holes to customise fit Material and Care Made of leatherette and jute for durability and style Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
